evaluation_order: 1. Hard stops — any single hard stop = DO_NOT_PROCEED immediately

outcomes.DO_NOT_PROCEED: Hard stop triggered. No payment shown. Attorney referral shown.
outcomes.ATTORNEY_RECOMMENDED: Attorney flags present. Show acknowledgment gate. If acknowledged, treat as PROCEED_RISK.
outcomes.PROCEED_RISK: Risk flags only. Payment unlocked. Persistent risk banner shown throughout.
outcomes.PROCEED: No flags. Payment unlocked. Clean eligibility confirmation shown.

hard_stops.question: Q0-01
trigger: I am a permanent resident of Canada, but not a Canadian citizen
I am not a Canadian citizen

hard_stops.question: Q0-03
trigger: I am currently in the United States without valid status

hard_stops.question: Q0-04
trigger: No — I do not currently have funds available for the investment

hard_stops.question: Q0-07
trigger: Yes — a loan secured by the assets of the business I am investing in

hard_stops.question: Q0-08
trigger: I will mainly be a passive investor

hard_stops.question: Q0-10
trigger: Passive real estate holding or rental-only investment

hard_stops.question: Q0-10
trigger: A business where I would not be actively involved in management

attorney_flags.question: Q0-03
trigger: I am currently in the United States and I am not sure whether my status is valid

attorney_flags.question: Q0-06
trigger: No — I cannot clearly document the source or movement of funds

attorney_flags.question: Q0-07
trigger: Yes — but I am not sure how the loan is secured

attorney_flags.question: Q0-11
trigger: Yes — one refusal, within the last 5 years

attorney_flags.question: Q0-13
trigger: Yes — a minor conviction within the last 10 years

attorney_flags.question: Q0-NI-composite
attorney_flags.note: Composite: calculated after Q0-NI-01, Q0-NI-02, Q0-NI-03

risk_flags.question: Q0-04
trigger: No — funds are available, but nothing has been committed yet

risk_flags.question: Q0-06
trigger: Mostly — I have most of the documentation, but there may be gaps

risk_flags.question: Q0-11
trigger: Yes — one refusal, more than 5 years ago

risk_flags.question: Q0-13
trigger: Yes — a minor conviction, more than 10 years ago

risk_flags.question: Q0-NI-01
trigger: Yes — I own Canadian property but may sell it before moving
No — I do not own Canadian real estate

risk_flags.question: Q0-NI-02
trigger: No — my immediate family will come with me
I do not have immediate family

risk_flags.question: Q0-NI-03
trigger: No — I plan to close or transfer all accounts

risk_flags.question: Q0-NI-composite
risk_flags.note: Composite: calculated after Q0-NI-01, Q0-NI-02, Q0-NI-03

investment_thresholds_usd.currency_conversion: Convert CAD to USD using daily cached rate before applying thresholds. Display rate used to user.
investment_thresholds_usd.note: No statutory minimum. Thresholds are advisory only based on observed practice.

post_payment_routing.solo: Load solo onboarding flow in Module 1
post_payment_routing.partnership: Load partnership onboarding flow in Module 1
post_payment_routing.family: Load spouse + children tabs in Module 3
post_payment_routing.risk_flags_present: Show persistent risk notes at relevant tabs

non_immigrant_intent_composite.description: After Q0-NI-01, Q0-NI-02, Q0-NI-03 — count confirmed ties

Q0-NI-01: Yes — I own Canadian property and will keep it
Q0-NI-02: Yes — close family will remain in Canada
Mixed — some family in Canada, some coming with me
Q0-NI-03: Yes — I will keep active Canadian financial accounts
Partially — I will keep some accounts active

version_notes: Q0-11: W-11 split → W-11-OLD (risk flag), W-11-RECENT (attorney), W-11-MULTIPLE (attorney). Trigger strings match questions JSON v2.1 exactly.
Q0-13: W-13 split → W-13-OLD (risk flag), W-13-RECENT (attorney), W-13-SERIOUS (attorney), W-13-UNSURE (attorney). Trigger strings match questions JSON v2.1 exactly.
Non-immigrant intent composite added: Q0-NI-01/02/03 individual flags + tie-count composite → W-NI-WEAK (risk) / W-NI-NONE (attorney).
Investment threshold floor corrected: $75K (not $100K/$50K). W-05 removed. W-PROP-SOFT ($75K–$149,999) and W-PROP-STRONG (<$75K) now in risk_flags and investment_thresholds_usd.
